---
description: "Heartbeat loop pattern for agents with long-running sessions"
---

# Ping Loop

Maintain a heartbeat during long-running agent sessions. Prevents stall detection from terminating active agents.

---

Call the heartbeat function every 60-120 seconds with a brief status message describing current activity.

When the `agent-intercom` capability pack is installed, use the intercom heartbeat / ping surface so
the operator sees that the agent is still alive and what phase it is currently working through.

## Stall Detection Thresholds

* Inactivity threshold: 300 seconds (5 minutes)
* Escalation threshold: 120 seconds (2 minutes)
* Max retries: 3

## Integration Notes

* No heartbeat needed during blocking tool calls (approval waits, user input)
* Resume heartbeat immediately after blocking calls complete
* Include progress indicators in status messages when available

If the intercom service is unavailable, warn that operator visibility is degraded and resume local-only
heartbeat behavior only when it is safe to continue.
